screen.jjk.techniques_hint: Choose the technique you want to prepare.
screen.jjk.hotbar_subtitle: One active technique and one separate passive.
screen.jjk.character_subtitle: Choose your fighter before entering combat.
screen.jjk.character_button_hint: Click to open the character selector again.
character.jjk.gojo_desc: A special-grade sorcerer built around Limitless. His style combines precise ranged pressure, spatial control and a passive defense sustained by Infinity.
character.jjk.itadori_desc: Explosive close-range fighter built around direct hits, pressure and physical combos.
character.jjk.sukuna_desc: Aggressive, lethal profile focused on cuts, direct punishment and offensive dominance.
character.jjk.megumi_desc: Tactical shikigami user whose bar mixes summons and battlefield control.
character.jjk.todo_desc: Brutal close-quarters fighter mixing position swaps with constant pressure.
technique.jjk.blue_desc: A cursed attraction technique that makes a blue sphere orbit around you, dragging nearby mobs and blocks before launching it from its current position when you release it.
technique.jjk.blue_hint: Select Blue on the hotbar, hold right click to make it orbit, and release to launch it from its current position.
technique.jjk.red_desc: Fires an expulsive sphere of reversed energy that travels forward, damages targets and tears through soft blocks.
technique.jjk.red_hint: Select Red on the hotbar and left click to fire the projectile forward.
technique.jjk.purple_desc: Fuses Blue and Red in front of Gojo to create a much larger cursed sphere that flies straight ahead, tears through blocks and overwhelms almost anything caught in its path.
technique.jjk.purple_hint: Select Purple on the hotbar and left click to start the fusion. After a short moment, the purple sphere will launch forward.
technique.jjk.flash_step_desc: A short-range instantaneous movement meant to reposition before or after using a technique.
technique.jjk.flash_step_hint: Not implemented yet, but it will be Gojo's fast mobility technique.
technique.jjk.infinity_desc: A passive Limitless layer that slows projectiles and prevents enemies from reaching Gojo's body directly.
technique.jjk.infinity_hint: Select Infinity on the hotbar and left click to toggle it without losing access to Blue or Red.
technique.jjk.diverging_fist_desc: A cursed-energy delayed strike meant to punish enemies at close range.
technique.jjk.diverging_fist_hint: Select Diverging Fist on the hotbar and left click at close range to land an opening hit followed by a delayed second impact.
technique.jjk.black_flash_desc: A precise impact wrapped in a dark spatial distortion.
technique.jjk.black_flash_hint: Not implemented yet, but it will be a high-damage active skill.
technique.jjk.rush_combo_desc: A short chain of attacks to keep constant pressure on the target.
technique.jjk.dismantle_desc: A fast cursed slash meant to break open the target's defense.
technique.jjk.cleave_desc: An adaptive slash tuned for punishing at close range.
technique.jjk.malevolent_shrine_desc: Unleashes a devastating offensive presence around the user.
technique.jjk.divine_dog_desc: Summons divine hounds to chase and pressure targets.
technique.jjk.nue_desc: An aerial summon for mobility and electric pressure from above.
technique.jjk.max_elephant_desc: A heavy shikigami meant for impact and zone control.
technique.jjk.boogie_woogie_desc: Swaps positions to break the rhythm of combat.
technique.jjk.close_quarters_desc: Heavy close-range pressure with a straightforward physical style.
technique.jjk.infinite_domain_desc: A fixed 20-block domain expansion that paralyzes mobs trapped inside and increases Gojo's damage by 50% within the area.
technique.jjk.infinite_domain_hint: Select Unlimited Void on the hotbar and left click to deploy a static domain around your current position.
message.jjk.technique_not_implemented: This technique is not implemented yet
message.jjk.blue_overload: Blue overloads and fires off on its own
message.jjk.red_cast: Red launched in front of you
message.jjk.purple_charge: Red and Blue begin to fuse
message.jjk.diverging_fist_cast: Diverging Fist lands and leaves cursed energy behind
message.jjk.diverging_fist_impact: Diverging Fist's delayed impact bursts out
message.jjk.diverging_fist_no_target: There is no target in front of you for Diverging Fist
message.jjk.infinity_no_energy: Infinity disabled: out of cursed energy
